case_title: JORGE SIERRA UCAN VS. RABINOVICH ALEX

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF UCAN, JORGE SIERRA AS TO DEFENDANT ALEX, RABINOVICH AKA ALEKSANDR RABINOVICH, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA STROGANOFF RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UCAN, JORGE SIERRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEX, RABINOVICH AKA ALEKSANDR RABINOVICH, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA STROGANOFF RESTAURANT $23,879.93 PRINCIPAL, $171.48 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,421.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
